title: Iceburg Reveals the Blueprints
description: The Pluton blueprints and Tom’s legacy become central as CP9 hunts the secret that Iceburg and Franky have protected.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci, Kaku. The Pluton blueprints and Tom’s legacy become central as CP9 hunts the secret that Iceburg and Franky have protected.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I have nothing to give you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You were all... with the government!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kalifa
dialogue.text: Before there are any more victims.

summary: The Pluton blueprints and Tom’s legacy become central as CP9 hunts the secret that Iceburg and Franky have protected.
